description: Official Python SDK for StripFeed. Convert any URL to clean, token-efficient Markdown for AI agents, RAG pipelines, and LLM workflows.
rules: Requires Python 3.9+, zero external dependencies (uses urllib)
sf.fetch(url, **options) returns dict with markdown, tokens, metadata
sf.fetch_markdown(url, **options) returns only the Markdown string
sf.batch(urls, model=None) fetches up to 10 URLs in parallel (Pro plan)
sf.usage() checks current monthly API usage and plan limits
Options: selector, format, model, cache, ttl, max_tokens
Errors are raised as StripFeedError with status and message attributes
